Steel Warehouse, founded in 1947 and headquartered in South Bend, Indiana, produces steel products. The Company offers panel flat, floor plate, hot rolled band, hot-rolled sheet, high strength low alloy, cold-rolled sheet, cold-rolled strip, and other steel products.

Website: https://www.steelwarehouse.com/

Revenue : $570.3M

Address: 2722 Tucker Dr, South Bend, Indiana, 46619, United States

Phone Number: (800) 348-2529
